text:
On Fri, Jul 13, 2012 at 10:30:21AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of math/slatec,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/169821 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

Well.. I submitted the patch myself, so I guess I approve of it.

HOwever, as I wrote, would be good for somebody to check it.
